title: Simulation of proton radiolysis of H2O and O2 ices with the Nautilus code
comment: 12 pages, 8 figures, accepted for publication in A&A, abstract adjusted for the requirements of ArXiv
summary: The radiolysis effect of cosmic rays (CRs) plays an important role in the chemistry in molecular clouds. CRs can dissociate the molecules on dust grains, producing reactive suprathermal species and radicals which facilitate the formation of large molecules. We add the radiolysis process and some relevant reactions into the Nautilus astrochemical code. By adjusting some parameters, we investigate the sensitivity of the simulation results of the H2O ice on the removal of reaction-diffusion competition, the removal of non-diffusive chemistry, and the desorption energies of the suprathermal species. We find the model, with a few adjustments of the chemistry, can reproduce the steady-state [H2O2]/[H2O] and [O3]/[O2]_0 abundance ratios in the H2O and O2 radiolysis experiments at any CR flux in the experiments. These adjustments in the model do not fully reproduce the fluence required to reach the steady state. It tends also to overestimate the destruction of H2O as measured in H2O radiolysis experiments. We show that reducing the G-values of H2O radiolysis, which implies an increase in the efficiency of immediate reformation of water locally after ion impact, leads to simulated H2O destruction rates closer to the experiments. The effect of reaction-diffusion competition on the simulation results of H2O ice is significant at $ζ\lesssim 10^{-14}\ \rm s^{-1}$. The non-diffusive chemistry affects the simulation results at 16 K but not 77K, while the results are sensitive to the desorption energies of suprathermal H, O, O3 and OH at 77 K. Our results show that the steady-state [H2O2]/[H2O] and [O3]/[O2]_0 in experiments can be reproduced by fine-tuning the chemical model, but still call for more constraints on the intermediate pathways in the radiolysis processes, especially the ion chemistry in the ice bulk, as well as activation barriers and branching ratios of the reactions in the network.

AI.tldr: 该研究将宇宙射线辐解过程整合到天体化学模型中，通过参数调整模拟水冰中H2O2和O3的生成，发现模型能复现稳态丰度比，但对达到稳态所需通量和H2O破坏速率的模拟存在偏差。
AI.motivation: 宇宙射线在分子云化学中起重要作用，能解离尘埃颗粒上的分子，产生超热物种和自由基，促进大分子形成。研究旨在将辐解过程整合到天体化学模型中，理解其对水冰化学的影响。
AI.method: 将辐解过程和相关反应添加到Nautilus天体化学代码中，通过调整参数（如反应扩散竞争、非扩散化学、超热物种解吸能等），研究模拟结果对水冰化学的敏感性。
AI.result: 模型通过化学调整能复现实验中的稳态[H2O2]/[H2O]和[O3]/[O2]_0丰度比，但对达到稳态所需通量的模拟不足，且高估了H2O的破坏速率。降低H2O辐解的G值（提高局部水再形成效率）能改善H2O破坏速率的模拟。
AI.conclusion: 反应扩散竞争在低宇宙射线通量下对水冰模拟结果影响显著；非扩散化学在16K有影响但在77K无影响；结果对超热H、O、O3和OH的解吸能敏感。稳态丰度比可通过模型微调复现，但需要更多对辐解过程中间路径、冰体离子化学、反应活化能垒和分支比的约束。

title: MEDUSA I. Tracing magnetic field structures in tidal arms of the dwarf-dwarf merger NGC 1487
summary: Dwarf galaxies are important laboratories for studying cosmic magnetism because they can maintain strong magnetic fields via the action of turbulent dynamo despite their low mass and weak gravitational potential. The Magnetic-field Evolution in Dwarf galaxies from Ultra-deep SKA Analysis (MEDUSA) survey is the first SKA-pathfinder programme designed to obtain deep continuum, polarisation, and HI data for dwarf galaxies, enabling a comprehensive study of their radio spectra, magnetic fields, and gas kinematics across a representative population. By analysing the radio continuum spectra and polarisation of the dwarf-dwarf galaxy merger NGC 1487 from the MEDUSA sample, we aim to determine its magnetic field strength and to characterise the large-scale and turbulent components of its magnetic field. We utilise highly sensitive multi-band radio continuum data from MeerKAT L-band (1.28 GHz) and Australia Telescope Compact Array (ATCA) L/S (2.1 GHz), C (5.5 GHz), and X-bands (9 GHz). We analysed the magnetic field configuration using polarisation and rotation measure (RM) synthesis. The integrated spectral energy distribution has a non-thermal spectral index of $α_{\rm nth} = -0.678\pm0.085$. Synchrotron and inverse Compton losses cause a spectral break at $ν_{\rm b} = 6.2\pm1.3$ GHz. In star-forming regions, the magnetic field exhibits strong small-scale fluctuations in RM, suggesting the action of a small-scale dynamo. Conversely, the field becomes more ordered, aligning with the tidal arms toward the galaxy's outskirts, showing a large-scale magnetic field over $\approx3$ kpc. Observations of the dwarf-dwarf merger NGC 1487 show that even low-mass galaxy mergers, likely the building blocks of larger galaxies in the early Universe, can rapidly amplify and produce coherent large-scale magnetic field structures, highlighting their key contribution in the early magnetisation of galaxies.

AI.tldr: 通过分析矮星系合并体NGC 1487的射电连续谱和偏振，发现即使低质量星系合并也能快速放大并产生相干的大尺度磁场结构，这对早期宇宙星系磁化有重要贡献。
AI.motivation: 矮星系是研究宇宙磁场的理想实验室，因为它们尽管质量小、引力势弱，仍能通过湍流发电机维持强磁场。MEDUSA调查旨在通过深度的连续谱、偏振和HI数据，全面研究矮星系的射电谱、磁场和气体运动学。
AI.method: 利用MeerKAT L波段(1.28 GHz)和ATCA L/S波段(2.1 GHz)、C波段(5.5 GHz)、X波段(9 GHz)的高灵敏度多波段射电连续谱数据。通过偏振和旋转测量(RM)合成分析磁场构型。
AI.result: 集成谱能分布的非热谱指数为α_nth = -0.678±0.085。同步辐射和逆康普顿损失导致在ν_b = 6.2±1.3 GHz处出现谱断。在恒星形成区，磁场表现出强烈的RM小尺度涨落，表明小尺度发电机作用；而在星系外围，磁场变得更加有序，与潮汐臂对齐，显示出约3 kpc的大尺度磁场。
AI.conclusion: 矮星系合并体NGC 1487的观测表明，即使是低质量星系合并（可能是早期宇宙中较大星系的构建块），也能快速放大并产生相干的大尺度磁场结构，这突显了它们在早期星系磁化过程中的关键贡献。

title: One Halo, Two Boundaries: Relating Accretion Shocks and Splashback Radii in Galaxy Clusters
summary: The boundaries of dark matter and gas in clusters are delineated by the splashback radius and the accretion shock, respectively. Theoretically, both of these boundaries are expected to coincide at the outskirts of halos. However, hydrodynamic cosmological simulations have highlighted significant displacement between them. In this study, we utilise the IllustrisTNG simulation suite to investigate the statistical relationship between the splashback and shock surfaces in a sample of 812 cluster-mass halos. We compute the full angular distribution of both boundaries and examine their relationship, also considering how different moments of this distribution correlate with halo properties. We employ a dispersion-based measure for the splashback boundary and the maximum entropy distance for the shock location. Despite examining various boundary definitions, we consistently observe an offset between the splashback and shock boundaries, with $R_{\rm sh}/R_{\rm sp} \sim 1.3-2$, depending on specific methodological choices. This offset predominantly occurs along void directions. We analyse the redshift evolution of these boundaries for a subset of halos and find that splashback and shock boundaries are not necessarily distinct at earlier times. During mergers, gas dissipates energy and resists contraction via pressure, unlike collisionless dark matter, leading to the observed boundary offset. We also find that the feature in pressure profiles arising from the outer accretion shock is sensitive to the exact method of stacking, which has important implications for observations.

AI.tldr: 通过IllustrisTNG模拟研究星系团中暗物质溅落半径与气体吸积激波边界的关系，发现两者存在显著偏移（R_sh/R_sp ~ 1.3-2），主要沿空洞方向发生，这种偏移源于气体在并合过程中的能量耗散和压力抵抗
AI.motivation: 理论上暗物质溅落半径和气体吸积激波边界在晕外围应该重合，但流体动力学宇宙学模拟显示两者存在显著位移。本研究旨在通过大规模模拟样本系统研究这两个边界之间的统计关系及其与晕性质的相关性
AI.method: 使用IllustrisTNG模拟套件分析812个星系团质量晕；计算溅落边界和激波边界的完整角分布；采用基于色散的溅落边界测量和最大熵距离确定激波位置；研究不同边界定义下的关系；分析子样本的红移演化
AI.result: 无论采用何种边界定义，溅落边界和激波边界始终存在偏移，R_sh/R_sp ~ 1.3-2；偏移主要沿空洞方向发生；早期红移时两个边界不一定分离；气体在并合过程中耗散能量并通过压力抵抗收缩，而暗物质无碰撞，导致边界偏移；压力剖面中的外吸积激波特征对叠加方法敏感
AI.conclusion: 暗物质溅落边界和气体吸积激波边界在星系团外围存在系统性偏移，这种偏移源于气体与暗物质在并合过程中的不同物理行为，对观测研究具有重要启示意义

title: Primordial Black Hole Formation in Rastall Gravity: Shifted Collapse Threshold and Exponential Abundance Sensitivity
summary: Primordial black holes formed in the early universe are compelling candidates for dark matter. We investigate their production in Rastall gravity, a modification of general relativity that introduces a non-minimal coupling between matter and geometry through the non-conservation of the energy-momentum tensor. Analyz- ing cosmological perturbations during radiation domination, we demonstrate that the Rastall parameter fundamentally alters the collapse dynamics, modifying the growth of density fluctuations, the critical threshold for black hole formation, and the fluctuation amplitude at horizon crossing. Current cosmological constraints from Big Bang Nucleosynthesis, the cosmic microwave background, and large-scale structure restrict the Rastall parameter to small values, yet within this allowed range PBH production can be altered by orders of magnitude compared to general relativity. Our results establish primordial black holes as novel probes of modified gravity.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了Rastall引力理论中原始黑洞的形成，发现Rastall参数能显著改变黑洞形成动力学，使PBH产量相比广义相对论发生数量级变化，从而将原始黑洞确立为探测修正引力理论的新探针。
AI.motivation: 原始黑洞是暗物质的潜在候选者，研究其在修正引力理论中的形成机制有助于探索早期宇宙物理和引力理论。Rastall引力作为广义相对论的修正，通过能量-动量张量的非守恒引入物质与几何的非最小耦合，可能影响原始黑洞的形成过程。
AI.method: 在辐射主导时期分析宇宙学扰动，研究Rastall参数如何改变密度扰动的增长、黑洞形成的临界阈值以及视界交叉时的扰动幅度。利用大爆炸核合成、宇宙微波背景辐射和大尺度结构等当前宇宙学观测约束Rastall参数的范围。
AI.result: 当前宇宙学约束将Rastall参数限制在较小值范围内，但即使在此允许范围内，原始黑洞的产量相比广义相对论可发生数量级的变化。Rastall参数从根本上改变了塌缩动力学，影响了密度扰动的增长、黑洞形成的临界阈值和视界交叉时的扰动幅度。
AI.conclusion: 原始黑洞可作为探测修正引力理论的新探针。Rastall引力理论中，即使参数受宇宙学观测严格约束，仍能显著改变原始黑洞的形成机制，这为通过原始黑洞观测检验引力理论提供了新途径。

title: Massive Black Hole formation in proto-stellar clusters via early gas accretion
comment: Talk delivered at the XIV Conference on New Frontiers in Physics, Crete, Greece 2025
summary: We review our semi-analytic model of stellar black hole (BH) mass growth by gas accretion in gas-rich stellar clusters during their birthstage within the first $\sim 10\,{\rm Myr}$ after the first stellar formation event. Such proto-stellar clusters are massive and compact, with typical masses $\sim 10^6\,{\rm M}_\odot$ and sizes $\sim 1\,{\rm pc}$, suggested by recent James Webb Space Telescope (JWST) observations. We find that the BH masses are shifted by the end of gas depletion to values within and above the BH mass gap, well within the range of components of the recent gravitational-wave (GW) signal GW231123, and up to masses $\sim 10^3\,{\rm M}_\odot$.

AI.tldr: 论文提出一个半解析模型，研究恒星黑洞在富气体星团形成早期通过气体吸积增长质量的过程，发现黑洞质量可增长至黑洞质量间隙范围内甚至以上，与GW231123引力波信号成分质量范围一致。
AI.motivation: 基于JWST观测发现的原恒星团（质量约10^6太阳质量，大小约1pc）的富气体环境，研究黑洞在星团形成早期如何通过气体吸积增长质量，解释观测到的引力波信号中黑洞质量分布。
AI.method: 使用半解析模型模拟恒星黑洞在气体丰富的原恒星团中的质量增长过程，考虑星团形成后约10Myr内的气体吸积物理机制。
AI.result: 黑洞质量在气体耗尽后可增长至黑洞质量间隙范围内甚至以上，与GW231123引力波信号成分的质量范围一致，最高可达约10^3太阳质量。
AI.conclusion: 富气体原恒星团中的气体吸积是黑洞质量增长至质量间隙范围的重要机制，能够解释近期引力波观测中黑洞质量分布特征。

title: BayeSED-GALAXIES II. Bayesian full spectrum analysis of galaxies and application in the CSST wide-field slitless spectroscopy survey
comment: 38 pages, including 16 figures and 2 tables; accepted for publication in ApJS. The mock CSST data for ~100,000 galaxies utilized in this work will be publicly available at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.17221343/. A Python script for an in-depth comparison between BayeSED3 and BAGPIPES is available at https://github.com/hanyk/BayeSED3/blob/main/tests/test_bayesed_bagpipes_comparison.py
summary: The China Space Station Telescope (CSST) will conduct wide-field multiband photometric imaging and slitless spectroscopic surveys, advancing cosmology and galaxy evolution studies. Achieving CSST's cosmological goals requires precise redshifts ($σ_{\rm NMAD}\lesssim 0.002-0.005$) from low-resolution ($R\sim200$) and potentially blended slitless spectra. We present BayeSED3, extended for Bayesian full-spectrum analysis, including nebular emission modeling (via \textsc{Cloudy}) and a Bayesian treatment of the model scaling factor, improving reliability over optimization methods for low SNR spectra. Validated on realistic mock data generated with the CESS emulator (median SNR=1.65, including instrumental and self-blending effects), our method achieves excellent redshift precision with three-band (GU+GV+GI) spectroscopy: $σ_{\rm NMAD}=0.0008$ ($\sim$80% success) for star-forming and $σ_{\rm NMAD}=0.0015$ ($\sim$50% success) for quiescent galaxies. Stellar mass ($σ_{\rm NMAD}\approx0.015$ dex for SF, $\approx0.016$ dex for quiescent) and SFR ($σ_{\rm NMAD}\approx0.05$ dex for SF, especially at SNR>1) are reliably recovered. Self-blending increases scatter by $\gtrsim30%$, but combining spectroscopy with CSST's seven-band photometry significantly improves accuracy, especially for quiescent galaxies and data-limited cases. Single-band spectroscopy plus photometry yields reasonable redshifts: GU+photometry is limited, GI+photometry gives >60% (SF) and >40% (quiescent) success at $σ_{\rm NMAD}\lesssim0.002$, GV+photometry gives >35% (SF) and $\sim$40% (quiescent) at similar precision. The Bayesian framework offers a powerful method for accurate galaxy characterization, enhancing CSST's scientific outcomes despite the challenges of slitless spectroscopy.

AI.tldr: BayeSED3扩展用于贝叶斯全光谱分析，包括星云发射建模和模型缩放因子的贝叶斯处理，显著提升了中国空间站望远镜低信噪比光谱的红移测量精度。
AI.motivation: 中国空间站望远镜将进行宽视场多波段测光和无缝光谱巡天，实现其宇宙学目标需要从低分辨率、可能混合的无缝光谱中获得精确红移（σ_NMAD≲0.002-0.005）。
AI.method: 扩展BayeSED3进行贝叶斯全光谱分析，包括通过Cloudy进行星云发射建模，并对模型缩放因子采用贝叶斯处理，相比优化方法在低信噪比光谱下更可靠。使用CESS模拟器生成包含仪器效应和自混合效应的真实模拟数据进行验证。
AI.result: 使用三波段（GU+GV+GI）光谱，对恒星形成星系达到σ_NMAD=0.0008（约80%成功率），对静止星系达到σ_NMAD=0.0015（约50%成功率）。恒星质量（SF约0.015 dex，静止约0.016 dex）和恒星形成率（SF约0.05 dex，特别是SNR>1时）可靠恢复。自混合使散射增加≳30%，但结合光谱和七波段测光显著提高了精度。
AI.conclusion: 贝叶斯框架为精确表征星系特征提供了强大方法，尽管无缝光谱面临挑战，但能显著提升中国空间站望远镜的科学成果。单波段光谱加测光也能获得合理的红移精度。

title: Reanalyzing DESI DR1: 5. Cosmological Constraints with Simulation-Based Priors
summary: We analyze the public DESI full-shape clustering data using simulation-based priors (SBPs). Our priors are obtained by fitting normalizing flows to the distribution of EFT parameters measured from field-level simulations, themselves generated using tailored halo occupation distribution (HOD) models for each tracer. Incorporating SBPs in a power spectrum analysis significantly enhances $Λ$CDM cosmological parameter constraints; in combination with BAO information from DESI DR2 and a BBN prior on the baryon density, we find the matter density parameter $Ω_m=0.2987\pm 0.0066$, the Hubble constant $H_0=68.80\pm 0.35\,\mathrm{km}\,\mathrm{s}^{-1}\mathrm{Mpc}^{-1}$, and the mass fluctuation amplitude $σ_8 = 0.766\pm 0.015$ (or the lensing parameter $S_8=0.764\pm 0.018$), which are $1\%$, $40\%$ and $50\%$ stronger than the baseline results, though with a notable downwards shift in $σ_8$. The SBPs also have a significant impact in extended models, with the dark energy figure-of-merit improving by $70\%$ ($20\%$) in a $w_0w_a$CDM analysis when combining with the CMB (and supernovae). In the SBP analysis, we do not find statistically significant evidence for dynamical dark energy: the equation of state parameters are consistent with a cosmological constant within $2.2σ$ ($1.4σ$) in analyses without (with) supernovae. The neutrino mass constraints are also enhanced, with the $95\%$ limits $M_ν<0.073\,\mathrm{eV}$ and $M_ν<0.090\,\mathrm{eV}$ in $Λ$CDM and $w_0w_a$CDM respectively. The latter is the strongest constraint obtained to date and reinforces the preference for the normal neutrino mass hierarchy, regardless of the background dynamics. While our results are sensitive to HOD modeling assumptions, they clearly demonstrate that the inclusion of small-scale information can significantly sharpen cosmological parameter constraints.

AI.tldr: 该研究使用基于模拟的先验（SBPs）分析DESI全形状聚类数据，显著增强了ΛCDM宇宙学参数约束，改进了暗能量和宇宙学常数的测量精度。
AI.motivation: 传统宇宙学参数分析受限于理论先验的不确定性，研究旨在通过基于模拟的先验方法，利用小尺度信息来显著增强宇宙学参数约束，特别是对暗能量、中微子质量等关键参数的测量精度。
AI.method: 采用基于模拟的先验（SBPs）方法，通过将归一化流拟合到场级模拟中测量的EFT参数分布来获得先验。使用定制的晕占据分布（HOD）模型为每个示踪物生成模拟，并将SBPs结合到功率谱分析中，与DESI DR2的BAO信息和BBN先验结合进行宇宙学参数约束。
AI.result: SBPs显著增强了ΛCDM参数约束：Ω_m=0.2987±0.0066，H_0=68.80±0.35 km/s/Mpc，σ_8=0.766±0.015（S_8=0.764±0.018），比基线结果分别强1%、40%和50%。暗能量品质因数在w_0w_aCDM分析中提高了70%（20%）。未发现动力学暗能量的显著证据，中微子质量约束增强，95%上限分别为M_ν<0.073 eV和M_ν<0.090 eV。
AI.conclusion: 基于模拟的先验方法能显著增强宇宙学参数约束，特别是对小尺度信息的利用可以大幅提高测量精度。虽然结果对HOD模型假设敏感，但证明了小尺度信息在宇宙学参数约束中的重要性，为未来宇宙学观测提供了新的分析方法。

title: Probing dark matter distributions with the pericentre precession of the stellar orbits near the Galactic Centre black hole
comment: 15 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables, Accepted for publication in MNRAS
summary: The Galactic Centre black hole provides a naive environment for understanding unknown matter distribution and new gravitational physics. For this stellar orbits in the nuclear star cluster are reliable probes. We investigate different dark matter mass profiles through pericentre shift of stellar orbits near the black hole. We also study capability of existing and upcoming astrometric facilities to detect dark matter induced precession and to distinguish between several dark matter profiles. Parameters of different dark matter density profiles are estimated by using the most recent upper bound on dark mass near the black hole. These profiles are then used for calculating the gravitational potential and hence the relativistic pericentre shift of both low and high eccentricity orbits of 13 S-stars. We use the recently measured deviation parameter $f_{sp}$ for investigating competition between dark matter and gravitational physics within S2's orbit. The astrometric shift of the pericentres has been calculated and compared with existing and upcoming astrometric capabilities of large and extremely large telescopes. The orbit of S2 is found to be insensitive to dark matter induced precession. Low eccentricity and wider orbits are prominent probes for measuring dark matter induced precession which is accessible to present and upcoming astrometric facilities such as Keck, GRAVITY and TMT. The existing and upcoming facilities can distinguish between different dark matter profiles for some stars and hence they posses the capability to distinguish between possible formation histories of the central region of our Galaxy.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过分析银河系中心黑洞附近恒星轨道的近心点偏移来探测暗物质分布，评估现有和未来天文观测设施区分不同暗物质密度剖面的能力。
AI.motivation: 银河系中心黑洞为理解未知物质分布和新引力物理提供了理想环境。恒星轨道是探测暗物质分布的可靠探针，但需要评估现有观测技术能否检测到暗物质引起的轨道进动效应。
AI.method: 使用最新的暗物质质量上限估计不同暗物质密度剖面的参数，计算这些剖面产生的引力势，进而计算13颗S星（包括低偏心率和高速心率轨道）的相对论性近心点偏移。利用S2星轨道的测量偏差参数f_sp研究暗物质与引力物理的竞争效应。
AI.result: S2轨道对暗物质引起的进动不敏感。低偏心率和较宽轨道是测量暗物质进动的突出探针，Keck、GRAVITY和TMT等现有和未来设施能够探测到这种效应。这些设施能够区分某些恒星的不同暗物质剖面，从而区分银河系中心区域可能的形成历史。
AI.conclusion: 银河系中心恒星轨道是探测暗物质分布的有效工具，特别是低偏心率和宽轨道。现有和未来的天文观测设施具备区分不同暗物质密度剖面的能力，为理解银河系中心区域的形成历史提供了新的观测手段。

recommendation.reason: 与 Zotero 兴趣画像中的 dark matter 等主题/作者匹配。

title: Evidence for Log-Periodic Modulation in High-Redshift Compact Object Abundance Consistent with Cyclic Condensate Collapse
summary:
We analyze the redshift distribution of high-$z$ galaxies and active galactic nuclei identified in early JWST data, and investigate the presence of periodic structure in the variable $x=\ln(1+z)$. A baseline-corrected unbinned frequency analysis reveals a statistically significant peak corresponding to a spacing $Δx \simeq 0.34$, suggesting an approximately log-periodic pattern in the redshift distribution.
  A periodic structure in $x$ implies a preferred scaling ratio in $(1+z)$, which may be interpreted as a realization of discrete scale invariance. We discuss the possibility that such behavior arises from cyclic condensate dynamics in Bose--Einstein condensate (BEC) cosmology. In the Fukuyama--Morikawa--Tatekawa framework, repeated collapse and re-formation episodes of a self-interacting condensate occur over characteristic timescales of order several $10^8$ years. When mapped into redshift space, this temporal periodicity naturally translates into an approximately constant spacing in $\ln(1+z)$.
  While the observed frequency is not interpreted as a sharp theoretical prediction, its magnitude is quantitatively consistent with the intrinsic cycle timescale of QCD-axion motivated condensate dynamics. The present analysis therefore provides observational support for cyclic BEC cosmology as a viable dynamical origin of log-periodic structure in the high-redshift universe.

AI.tldr: JWST早期数据中高红移星系和活动星系核的红移分布显示出log周期结构，Δx≈0.34的间距可能源于玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚体宇宙学中的循环凝聚动力学。
AI.motivation: 研究JWST早期数据中高红移星系和活动星系核的红移分布是否存在周期性结构，探索这种结构背后的物理机制，特别是与玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚体宇宙学中循环凝聚动力学的关联。
AI.method: 对高红移星系和活动星系核的红移分布进行基线校正的无分箱频率分析，使用变量x=ln(1+z)来检测log周期结构，并将观测到的周期性映射到Fukuyama-Morikawa-Tatekawa框架中的BEC宇宙学模型。
AI.result: 分析发现了一个统计显著的峰值，对应间距Δx≈0.34，表明红移分布中存在近似log周期模式。这种周期性在(1+z)中表现为优先缩放比例，与QCD轴子驱动的凝聚体动力学内在循环时间尺度在数量上一致。
AI.conclusion: 观测到的log周期结构为循环BEC宇宙学提供了观测支持，表明这种结构可能源于自相互作用凝聚体的重复坍缩和再形成过程，这为高红移宇宙中的离散尺度不变性提供了可行的动力学起源。
